channel.title: Transcriptor
channel.description: Transcribe audio with Whisper / AssemblyAI + AI-powered PDF export.

item.title: Version 8.2
item.description:
Transcriptor V8.2

  • True native macOS app — no more browser tab
  • Auto-update via Sparkle (Ed25519-signed)
  • For-IT admin tab with security/privacy disclosure
  • First-launch privacy consent dialog
  • CSV export from admin for SIEM/audit
